message:
Switch wasm-opt to -Oz, add knip config for dead code detection

- build:opt: -O3 → -Oz --strip-producers (size-optimize WASM)
- Add knip.json to suppress false positives (bench/, examples/, zig binary)
- knip confirms zero unused exports/types/dependencies in library code

files.patch:
@@ -10,10 +10,10 @@
   ],
   "scripts": {
     "build:zig": "zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall",
-    "build:opt": "npx wasm-opt -O3 dist/engine.wasm -o dist/engine.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals",
+    "build:opt": "npx wasm-opt -Oz --strip-producers dist/engine.wasm -o dist/engine.wasm --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-sign-ext --enable-mutable-globals",
     "build:js": "bun x tsc",
     "build": "bun run build:zig && bun run build:opt && bun run build:js",
-    "test": "bun test/phase1.mjs && bun test/phase2.mjs && bun test/parse-result.mjs && bun test/is-complete.mjs && bun test/partial-json.mjs && bun test/zerocopy.mjs && bun test/standards.mjs",
+    "test": "bun test/phase1.mjs && bun test/phase2.mjs && bun test/parse-result.mjs && bun test/is-complete.mjs && bun test/partial-json.mjs && bun test/zerocopy.mjs && bun test/standards.mjs && bun test/event-parser.mjs",
     "bench": "bun --expose-gc bench/parse-stream.mjs",
     "bench:parse": "bun --expose-gc bench/parse-stream.mjs",
     "bench:e2e": "bun --expose-gc bench/end-to-end.mjs",
